scripts.dev:engine: cd apps/engine && (test -d .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt && .venv/bin/uvicorn api.index:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n landing,web,stats,api,engine -c blue,green,cyan,yellow,magenta "pnpm --filter @caffe-del-deploy/landing dev" "pnpm --filter @caffe-del-deploy/web dev" "pnpm --filter @caffe-del-deploy/stats dev" "pnpm --filter @caffe-del-deploy/api dev" "pnpm dev:engine"
scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && cd apps/engine && (test -d .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
